Office Assistant & Bookkeeper • Track and record deposited checks and sales transaction revenue through the POS system and business financial banking account. • Prepare and issue monthly billing invoices for client personal expenses. • Process personal and business checks, facilitate money transfers (e.g., MoneyGram) for customers. • Calculate and document payroll taxes, wages, and generate reports using QuickBooks and 21st Century Accounting. • Receive and respond to customer calls regarding various business-related inquiries and issues.
